proven.claim: Proven: "--signal-model" is documented in help (line 560) and consumed by

; LINE: 560
; Proven: "--signal-model" is documented in help (line 560) and consumed by

(assert (= signalmodel_documented 1))

; Expected: unsat — --signal-model is documented and configures LLM signal generator
